gist.headline: Balancing the scales
gist.blurb: Adjusted the Pollen cost for the GLM-5.2 model to its intended standard rate.
gist.summary: Corrected the price multiplier for the GLM-5.2 text model from 0.5 to 1 in the model registry.
gist.impact: Requests to GLM-5.2 will now deduct the standard 1x Pollen cost instead of the previous half-rate.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot adjusting a price tag or a scale next to a glowing text model terminal, representing a pricing correction.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot adjusting a small pixelated price tag on a glowing retro terminal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot adjusting a small pixelated price tag on a glowing retro terminal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
